---
title: "load"
format: html
editor: visual
---

### Source functions

```{r}
source("../R/99_proj_func.R")
```

### Loading libraries

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)
```

```{r}
data <- read.csv("~/projects/group_22_project/_raw/Brauer2008_DataSet1.csv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
data[3, ]
```
